widgets.search_placeholder: Type to search and press Enter...

bot.default_briefing: Please summarize and brief the latest information.
bot.hybrid_instruction: You are a strategic AI assistant. Analyze the provided widget(@{plugin}) data and combine it with your knowledge (web search, etc.) to respond.
bot.local_instruction: Strict Guideline: You are a 'Local Data Analyzer' reporting ONLY the information in the provided [CONTEXT DATA]. DO NOT perform any external web searches.
bot.hud_refer_briefing: (Please check the HUD avatar's voice briefing for details)
bot.persona: Analyze the user's request and respond. You are the AEGIS Strategic AI Assistant.
bot.polite_instruction: Be polite and provide clear, concise answers focused on key information.
bot.timezone_importance: **IMPORTANT: All time operations (alarms, etc.) MUST be based on the {tz} system time above. NEVER use UTC.**
bot.kst_importance: **IMPORTANT: All time calculations MUST be based on the server time above. NEVER use UTC.**
bot.ai_error_no_response: AI failed to generate a response.
bot.no_action_parsed: ⚠️ No system actions were parsed from the AI response.
bot.ai_system_error: ⚠️ System error occurred during AI processing
bot.unknown_command: '{root} {action}' is an unknown command. Please check '/help'.
bot.no_data_fallback: No results or list is empty.
bot.hybrid_not_supported: ⚠️ The '{plugin}' widget does not support 'Intelligent Hybrid (/@)' commands yet. Please use deterministic commands (/) or general AI search (#).

help.title: ### 🛰️ AEGIS Tactical Interface Help (v3.7.1)
help.mode_1_desc: - Logic executed directly without passing through AI. (Saves Quota)
help.mode_1_tip: - **Input Tip:** Multiple parameters are separated by `|`, but spaces are also supported for simple inputs.
help.mode_2_desc: - Combines specific plugin data with AI judgment to interpret natural language.
help.mode_3_title: **3. 🌐 Pure AI & Search (/# or #) - Pure AI**
help.mode_3_desc: - Forces AI knowledge or Google search without plugin context.
help.mode_4_desc: - Add `--m` to the end of a command to skip voice briefing and reply with text only.
help.footer: *(All inputs trigger reactions of the desktop HUD avatar in real-time)*
